metadata.description: Fablers plugin collection — design methodology, document forging, agentic RAG, and a grimoire of reusable skills

plugins.name: vibe-architecture
plugins.description: Vibe coding design methodology — structured design, 6-axis review scoring, Agent Teams concrete-design workflow, and session skill extraction

plugins.name: damascus
plugins.description: Forge documents through iterative multi-LLM review — like Damascus steel, stronger through repeated folding.

plugins.name: fablers-agentic-rag
plugins.description: Agentic RAG pipeline using Claude agents for query analysis, hybrid retrieval, evaluation, and answer synthesis with CRAG validation.

plugins.name: grimoire
plugins.description: A grimoire of reusable Claude Code skills — orchestration patterns and behaviors you can invoke from any project, not tied to a specific command. A growing collection, not a single-purpose plugin (currently: agent-teams orchestration).
